      intro n m h
      simp [f] at h
      have h₂ : (n + 2 : ℚ) = (m + 2 : ℚ) := by

      intro n
      have h₃ : f n = ((n + 2 : ℚ), (n + 2 : ℚ), 1 / ((n + 2 : ℚ) * (n + 2 : ℚ))) := rfl
      rw [h₃]
